brand.tagline: Saudi Arabia's Digital Marketplace for Construction & Design

hero.tagline: Saudi Arabia's Digital Marketplace for Construction & Design
hero.description: Rasi connects project owners with qualified contractors and engineers. Post your project with clear specifications, receive offers from verified professionals, and compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard — then award with a documented workflow.
hero.microcopy: Post in minutes — no documents required to start.

step1.title: Post Your Project
step1.desc: Add project details, location, service type, estimated budget, and timeline. Upload drawings or photos if available.

step2.title: Receive & Compare Offers
step2.desc: Offers arrive from qualified contractors or engineers. Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.

step3.title: Decide with Confidence
step3.desc: Ask questions, request clarifications, and award your decision. The contractual relationship begins directly between you and the awarded party.

owners.title: For Project Owners
owners.headline: Stop searching alone. Let qualified professionals come to your project.
owners.desc: Whether you are building a villa, designing a space, finishing an office, renovating a home, or developing a commercial project — Rasi turns your idea into a structured project request that reaches the right contractors and engineers.

pros.title: For Contractors & Engineers
pros.headline: Real projects are looking for your expertise.
pros.desc: If you are a licensed contractor or specialized engineer, Rasi gives you a structured channel to reach serious project owners. Build a verified professional profile and compete for projects that match your specialty.
pros.item1: Access real projects with clear specifications
pros.item2: Verified professional profile showcasing your work
pros.item3: Competition based on capability, not connections

card1.title: Construction-Specific by Design
card1.desc: Rasi is not a generic services directory. Every feature — from professional profiles to comparison dashboards — is engineered around construction, design, finishing, and renovation projects.

card2.title: Qualification Before Competition
card2.desc: Offers appear on the platform only from professionals who have cleared profile, specialization, and experience review. Verification is the condition for competing — not a marketing label.

card3.title: Structured Comparison
card3.desc: We convert offers from fragmented WhatsApp conversations into structured, comparable data on unified criteria. The decision becomes clearer, and real differences actually surface.

card4.title: Built for the Saudi Market
card4.desc: From verification flows to professional classifications, Rasi is built on a real understanding of Saudi contracting norms, local contractor workflows, and regulatory context.

trustTiers.description: Platform quality is not measured by registration counts, but by the quality of those allowed to compete. We designed a multi-stage process to raise the trust baseline and reduce decision ambiguity.

tier1.name: Registered
tier1.desc: Completed registration and basic verification. Ready to browse active projects.

tier2.name: Qualified
tier2.desc: Complete profile with documented experience in the declared specialty. Eligible to submit offers.

tier3.name: Preferred
tier3.desc: Strong performance record and accumulated positive ratings. Featured placement in comparison dashboards.

tier4.name: Elite
tier4.desc: Sustained high performance, continuous commitment, and a documented track record on the platform.

quote.text: The single most consequential moment in any construction project is choosing the right executing party — it determines quality, cost discipline, and error rates.
quote.attribution: Rasi · Saudi Arabia's Digital Marketplace for Construction & Design

cta.description: Whether you are a project owner or a construction professional — the right next step starts here.
cta.footer: Post in minutes · No documents required · Sunday–Thursday 9AM–6PM Riyadh

footer.description: Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design. We organize the decision journey from brief to award.
footer.company: Operated by Information Technology Integrated Solutions Co.
